userStories.story: As a student, I want to answer MCQ questions correctly so that I can test my understanding
criteria: Given I am on a lesson page with an MCQ exercise
When I select the correct answer and click Check
Then I see correct feedback

userStories.story: As a student, I want to answer MCQ questions incorrectly so that I can see feedback on wrong answers
criteria: Given I am on a lesson page with an MCQ exercise
When I select the wrong answer and click Check
Then I see incorrect feedback

userStories.story: As a student, I want to answer True/False questions so that I can quickly assess my knowledge
criteria: Given I am on a lesson page with a T/F exercise
When I click True or False
Then the answer is automatically checked and I see feedback

userStories.story: As a student, I want to type free response answers so that I can explain my reasoning
criteria: Given I am on a lesson page with a free response exercise
When I type my answer and click Check
Then my answer is submitted for validation

userStories.story: As a student, I want to connect matching pairs so that I can complete matching exercises
criteria: Given I am on a lesson page with a matching exercise
When I click on left items and then corresponding right items
Then the pairs are connected

userStories.story: As a student, I want to request a hint when stuck so that I can get help without seeing the solution
criteria: Given I am on an exercise and cannot answer
When I click the Hint button
Then a hint is displayed to guide me

userStories.story: As a student, I want to unlock the solution after using hints so that I can learn from the complete answer
criteria: Given I have used a hint and seen the guiding question
When I click the Solution button
Then the full solution is displayed
